{"society_power": 9.5, "state_power": 9.5, "society_change": 0.0, "state_change": 0.5, "key_event": "Liberal welfare reforms and Labour's parliamentary breakthrough", "reasoning": "The state expanded its administrative and fiscal reach through New Liberal welfare reforms (pensions, education, war-driven taxation), pushing state power toward the top of the rubric. Society remained near its already-dominant ceiling: labour and suffragette mobilization plus the Trade Disputes Act reversing Taff Vale offset momentary setbacks, but persistent suffrage exclusion capped further gains."}
